raw_consumer_statement: Amex grossly neglects to manage the disputes properly. During my travels, a couple of hotels happened to be providing unacceptable conditions and lacking the advertised amenities, leading to my disputes. Amex consulted with the hotels which used fraudulent strategies ( or just lies ) to invalidate my claims, such as lying that I didn't complain to the front desk and give them the chance to fix it. Amex consistently closed my disputes in responses although I have brought these issues and claims to their attention and repeatedly reopened the claims.
